shared_attributes.design_principle: maximum clarity at minimum size, non-intrusive

context.role: popup menu with 3 care action buttons (feed, clean, pet), appears on screen tap
context.screen_position: lower right corner (x=96-120, y=108-116) when visible
context.usage_scenario: hidden by default, appears when player taps screen, shows 3 clickable icons, hides after action or timeout

visual_specification.shape: horizontal row of 3 square icon buttons (8x8px each)
visual_specification.texture: solid background with simple icon shapes

animation.description: frame 1: visible state (icons in color), frame 2: disabled state (icons grayed out #5F574F when on cooldown), instant toggle on/off

visual_specification.details: 3 icons: (1) seed shape (#FFA300) for feed, (2) broom shape (#C2C3C7) for clean, (3) hand shape (#FFCCAA) for pet. Each icon 8x8px, positioned at x=96, 104, 112. Dark navy background (#1D2B53). Icons turn gray (#5F574F) when action is on cooldown.

relationships.shared_with: icon colors match related game elements (seed=orange, broom=gray, hand=skin tone)
relationships.differences_from: only UI element that appears/disappears, interactive buttons unlike passive happiness bar, overlays game screen

explicit_negations: no borders or outlines around icons
